title: Acuant Face Match Result
description: Schema for the response from the Acuant FRM Face Recognition and Matching API.

Score.description: Match confidence score (0-100). Higher values indicate greater likelihood that both images depict the same person.

IsMatch.description: Whether the match score exceeds the configured threshold for a positive match.

TransactionId.description: Unique identifier for this face match transaction.

Error.description: Error message if face detection or matching failed.

ErrorCode.description: Numeric error code if an error occurred.
